scheme_name: Scheme for Relief and Rehabilitation of Women Acid Victims
page_title: Scheme for Relief and Rehabilitation of Women Acid Victims

details: The scheme "Relief and Rehabilitation of Women Acid Victims" was launched by the Women and Child Development Department, Government of Haryana. It aims to provide financial and medical assistance to acid attack victims who are residents of Haryana and have suffered attacks within the state.

Under the scheme, the victim is entitled to receive 100% free medical treatment from government or government-approved hospitals. Additionally, an ad-hoc relief of ₹1.00 lakh is provided to the acid attack victim, which is later reimbursed by the Women and Child Development Department.
benefits: Under the scheme, the following benefits will be provided to women acid attack victims:
₹25,000/- as ad-hoc relief immediately by the concerned Deputy Commissioner.
₹75,000/- within 15 days by the Women and Child Development Department for immediate medical expenses.

Finance Support for 100% medical treatment including medicine, food, bedding and plastic surgery/reconstructive surgery, if any from amongst any of the Government Hospital/Government approved hospitals.
eligibility: The applicant should be an acid attack victim girl/woman.
The applicant should be a resident of Haryana.
The applicant should be a victim of an acid attack occurring on or after 02.05.2011.
The applicant should have suffered an acid attack within Haryana.
The applicant should not have been fully cured or completed all medical procedures, as continuing treatment is covered under the scheme.
This scheme's RTS (Right to Service) time limit is 30 days.

online: Apply for Scheme: Registration Process on Antyodaya-SARAL Portal:
To avail of the benefits of the scheme, the applicant needs to visit the Official Portal -
If the applicant is not registered on the portal, then he/she gets registered on the portal.
For registration, click on “New User/Register Here” and fill in all the mandatory details i.e. Name, Email ID, Mobile Number & password. Click on ‘Submit’.
Applicants will receive the login ID on their mobile number.
Login to Apply for the Scheme:
The “Sign in here” option is available on the right side of the screen. Applicant needs to fill in their credentials and click on the ‘Login’ button.
In the opened window, click on “Scheme/Services list” and a list of schemes will appear on the screen.
Now, select the scheme and click on “Apply for Service/Scheme”.
Fill in all the details asked in the online application form and submit the application form.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for the Scheme for Relief and Rehabilitation of Women Acid Victims?
faqs.answer: Any woman or girl who is a victim of an acid attack after 02.05.2011 and is a resident of Haryana.

faqs.question: What financial support does the scheme provide?
faqs.answer: The scheme provides ₹25,000/- as ad-hoc relief and ₹75,000/- for immediate medical expenses.

faqs.question: What type of medical treatment is covered under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme covers 100% medical treatment, including medicines, food, bedding, and plastic/reconstructive surgery, if necessary.

faqs.question: How do I apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Apply by visiting https://saralharyana.gov.in/, registering as a new user, and submitting the required details.

faqs.question: What documents are required to apply?
faqs.answer: Parivar Pehchan Patra Number, Medical Certificate, Court Order, and Copy of FIR.

faqs.question: What are the service charges for applying?
faqs.answer: There is no fee for government charges, but there is a ₹10/- charge for Kendra and Atal Seva Kendra (CSC) services.

faqs.question: Is there a time limit for processing the application?
faqs.answer: The RTS time limit for processing the application is 30 days.

faqs.question: Can I apply if I am still undergoing treatment for my acid injuries?
faqs.answer: Yes, victims who are still undergoing treatment can apply due to the continuing cause of action.

faqs.question: How long will it take to receive financial assistance after applying?
faqs.answer: Ad-hoc relief of ₹25,000/- is provided immediately by the concerned DC, and ₹75,000/- will be provided within 15 days by the Women and Child Development Department.

faqs.question: Who can I contact if I need help or have further questions?
faqs.answer: For any enquiry, you can call the helpline at 0172-3968400 or email saral.haryana@gov.in.
